allow: Bash(# Check Fabric API''s merged jar for isLadder find ~/.gradle/caches/fabric-loom -name ""*.jar"" -not -name ""*sources*"" | while read jar; do if javap -cp ""$jar"" net.fabricmc.fabric.api.block.v1.FabricBlockMixin | grep -q ""isLadder""; then echo ""Found isLadder in: $jar"" javap -cp ""$jar"" net.fabricmc.fabric.api.block.v1.FabricBlockMixin | grep -i ""ladder"" fi done)

Bash(# Check what interfaces Block implements and if any have isLadder javap -cp ~/.gradle/caches/fabric-loom/minecraftMaven/net/minecraft/minecraft-merged/1.20.1-net.fabricmc.yarn.1_20_1.1.20.1+build.10-v2/minecraft-merged-1.20.1-net.fabricmc.yarn.1_20_1.1.20.1+build.10-v2.jar net.minecraft.block.Block)
Bash(# Check if isLadder is defined in the merged minecraft+fabric jar find ~/.gradle/caches/fabric-loom -name ""*.jar"")
Bash(# Find the actual merged jar used at compile time by looking at the build directory find /Users/bgrace/Downloads/verdant-master/verdant-fabric/.gradle -name ""*.jar"")
Bash(xargs -I{} sh -c 'javap -cp {} net.minecraft.block.Block 2>/dev/null | grep -i ""isLadder"" && echo ""Found in: {}""')
